app.rdg: 1. Tu e'tl o kwi Beda a kwi Sherk-Siam dhual swatihuhted, gula tu hoyutsut atsilhtalbihu?
1. tu툾톛쿹퉢 툾u k퉝i b톛da툾 툾톛 k퉝i s팳톛q si툾ab dx퉝툾al swatix퉝t톛d, g퉝톛l tuhuyutcut 툾aci톫talbix퉝.
1. went Q the son of the sky nobleman unto earth then made+self man
1. Did the Son of God go to earth and make himself a man?
E, tu e'tl kwi Beda a kwi Sherk-Siam dhual ku swatihuhted gula tu hoyutsut atsilhtalbihu.
툾i, tu툾톛쿹퉢 k퉝i b톛da툾 툾톛 k퉝i s팳톛q si툾ab dx퉝툾al k퉝i swatix퉝t톛d g퉝톛l tuhuyutcut 툾aci톫talbix퉝.
yes went the son of the sky nobleman unto earth then made+self man
Yes, the Son of God did go to earth and make himself a man.
2. Tu kudatob o a kwi Beda a kwi Sherk-Siam ku dcho tsokwab rolab aku tsokwabchelh eku dcho sele rolab aku selechelh.
2. tuk퉝톛dat톛b 툾u 툾톛 k퉝i b톛da툾 툾톛 k퉝i s팳톛q si툾ab k퉝i d톛c팳'u툾 c퉢uk퉢퉝톛b x팳퉝ul퉢ab 툾톛 k퉝i c퉢uk퉢퉝톛bc팳톛톫 툾i k퉝i d톛c팳'u툾 sh톛li? x팳퉝ul퉢ab 툾톛 k퉝i sh톛li툾c팳톛톫.
2. taken Q by the son of the sky nobleman the one body like of the body+our and the one soul like of the soul+our
2. Did the Son of God take a body like our body and a soul like our soul?
E, tu kudatob a kwi Beda a kwi Sherk-Siam ku dcho tsokwab rolab aku tsokwabchelh eku dcho sele rolab aku selechelh;
툾i, tuk퉝톛dat톛b 툾톛 k퉝i b톛da툾 툾톛 k퉝i s팳톛q si툾ab k퉝i d톛c팳'u툾 c퉢uk퉢퉝톛b x팳퉝ul퉢ab 툾톛 k퉝i c퉢uk퉢퉝톛bc팳톛톫 툾i k퉝i d톛c팳'u툾 sh톛li툾 x팳퉝ul퉢ab 툾톛 k퉝i sh톛li툾c팳톛톫
yes taken by the son of the sky nobleman the one body like of the body+our and the one soul like of the soul+our
Yes, the Son of God took a body like our body and a soul like our soul.
asista ku tu dahu hoyils atsilhtalbihu.
툾톛s툾ist톛툾 k퉝i tud톛x퉝huyils 툾aci톫talbix퉝.
this the way-made human
This is how He became man.
3. Al o ku 'tlach akus halh duhkralap Mari ku tus hois atsilhtalbihu Beda, a kwi Sherk-Siam?
3. 툾al 툾u k퉝i 쿹퉢ac팳 툾톛 k퉝si ha툾톫 dx퉝qalap Mali k퉝i tushuys 툾aci톫talbix퉝 b톛da툾, 툾톛 k퉝i s팳톛q si툾ab.
3. in Q the belly of the good virgin Mary the making man son of the sky nobleman
3. Was it in the womb of the blessed virgin Mary that the Son of God was made man?
E, al ku 'tlach akus halh duhkralap Mari ku tus hois atsilhtalbihu Beda a kwi Sherk-Siam.
툾i, 툾al k퉝i 쿹퉢ac팳 툾톛 k퉝si ha툾톫 dx퉝qalap Mali k퉝i tushuys 툾aci톫talbix퉝 b톛da툾 툾톛 k퉝i s팳톛q si툾ab.
yes in the belly of the good virgin Mary the making man son of the sky nobleman
Yes, it was in the womb of the blessed virgin Mary that the Son of God was made man.
4. Whe o ku tus willes kwi dokwibalh Beda adokwibalh a aku tus hois atsilhtalbihu?
4. x퉝i툾 툾u k퉝i tusx팳퉝il퉢i(l)s k퉝i duk퉝ib톛톫 b톛da툾 툾톛 duk퉝ib톛톫 툾a 툾톛 k퉝i tushuys 툾aci톫talbix퉝.
4. not Q the lose the Changer son Changer there of the made man
Didn't the Son of God lose God when He became man?
Whe ku tus willes kwi dokwibalh Beda a dokwibalh a aku tus hois atsilhtalbihu;
x퉝i툾 k퉝i tusx팳퉝il퉢i(l)s k퉝i duk퉝ib톛톫 b톛da툾톛 duk퉝ib톛톫 툾a 툾톛 k퉝i tushuys 툾aci톫talbix퉝 ;
not the lose the changer son of changer there of the made man
No, the Son of God did not lose God when He became man.
tskwakred dokwibalh tsid칥lh tor ba atsilhtalbihu.
ck퉢퉝aqid duk퉝ib톛톫 c톛di톫 tux팳퉝 b톛툾aci톫talbix퉝.
always changer that although man
He is always God even though man.
5. Gwat kwi tu sda a kwi Beda a kwi Sherk-Siam aku tus hois atsilhtalbihu?
5. g퉝wat k퉝i tusda툾 툾톛 k퉝i b톛da툾 툾톛 k퉝i s팳톛q si툾ab 툾톛 k퉝i tushuys 툾aci톫talbix퉝.
5. what the past name of the son of the sky nobleman at+the past made man
5. What was the name of the Son of God when he was made man?
Shesu-Kri ku tu sda a kwi Beda a kwi Sherk-Siam aku tus hois atsilhtalbihu.
Shesu-Kri k퉝i tusda툾 툾톛 k퉝i b톛da 툾톛 k퉝i s팳톛q si툾ab 툾톛 k퉝i tushuys 툾aci톫talbix퉝.
Jesus Christ the past name of the son of the sky nobleman at+the past made man
Jesus Christ was the name of the Son of God when he was made man?
6. Dhual asared ku tus hoyutsuts atsilhtalbihu Beda akwi Sherk-Siam?
6. dx퉝툾al 툾톛s툾톛x팳id k퉝i tushuyucuts 툾aci톫talbix퉝 b톛da툾 툾톛 k퉝i s팳톛q si툾ab.
6. unto why the past made+self man son of+the sky nobleman
Why did the Son of God make himself a man?
Tu hoyutsut atsilhtalbihu Beda a kwi Sherk-Siam
tuhuyutcut 툾aci톫talbix퉝 b톛da 툾톛 k퉝i s팳톛q si툾ab
past made+self man son of+the sky nobleman
The Son of God made himself a man
dhual kwi gwas trotobolhs tolal ku tskwadadchelh eku tolal ku gwed hud eba dhual kwi gwas ortobolhs duhsherk.
dx퉝툾al k퉝i g퉝톛stx팳퉝utubu톫s tul퉢툾al k퉝i 퉋톛k퉢퉝adadc팳톛톫 툾i k퉝i tul퉢툾al k퉝i g퉝톛d hud 툾ib톛 dx퉝툾al k퉝i g퉝톛s툾ux팳퉝utubu톫s d톛x퉝ss팳톛q.
unto the IRREAL pull+us from the sin+us and+the from the IRREAL fire
in order to pull us from our sins and from the fire and in order to make us ascend to heaven.
7. To abijtobolh o ku Shesu-Kri aku tus atebeds al lekwe ?
7. tu툾abyitubu톫 툾u k퉝i Shesu-Kri 툾톛 k퉝i tus툾at톛b톛ds 툾al l톛kw톛.
7. past receive Q the Jesus Christ the past death on the+cross
7. Was Jesus Christ put to death on the cross?
E, tu abijtobolh ku Shesu-Kri a ku tus atebeds al lekwe.
툾i, tu툾abyitubu톫 k퉝i Shesu-Kri 툾톛 k퉝i tus툾at톛b톛ds 툾al l톛kw톛.
yes, past receive the Jesus Christ the past death on the+cross
Yes, Jesus Christ was put to death on the cross.
8. Tu atebed o kwi Shesu-Kri al stselatselh datils gula tu palil o al raraalhdat?
8. tu툾at톛b톛d 툾u k퉝i Shesu-Kri 툾al c톛lac톛톫datils g퉝톛l tup팻alil 툾u 툾al x팳a툾x팳a툾톛톫dat.
8. died Q the Jesus-Christ on fifth-day then regain_consciousness Q on holy_day
8. Did Jesus die on Friday and did He resurrect on Sunday?
E, tu atebed ku Shesu-Kri al stselatselh datils gula tu palil al raraalhdat.
툾i, tu툾at톛b톛d k퉝i Shesu-Kri 툾al c톛lac톛톫datils g퉝톛l tup팻alil 툾al x팳a툾x팳a툾톛톫dat.
yes died Q the Jesus-Christ on fifth-day then regain_consciousness on holy_day
Yes, Jesus did die on Friday and resurrect on Sunday.
9. Sbosache o slar^el ku tus als swatihuhted Shesu-Kri tolal ku tus palils gula tu orduhsherk?
9. sbuusac팳i툾 툾u sl톛x팳il k퉝i tus툾als swatix퉝t톛d Shesu-Kri tul퉢툾al k퉝i tusp팻alils g퉝톛l tu툾ux팳퉝dx퉝s팳톛q.
9. forty Q days the past be world Jesus Christ from the revival+his then past go+up+heaven
9. Was Jesus Christ on the earth for forty days from when he resurrected and then ascended to heaven?
E, sbosache slar칡l ku tus als swatihuhted Shesu-Kri tolal ku tus palils gula tu orduhsherk.
툾톛, sbuusac팳i툾 sl톛x팳il k퉝i tus툾als swatihuht톛d Shesu-Kri tul퉢툾al k퉝i tusp팻alils g퉝톛l tu툾ux팳퉝dx퉝s팳톛q.
yes forty days the past be world Jesus Christ from the revival+his then past go+up+heaven
Yes, Jesus Christ was on the earth for forty days from when he resurrected and then ascended to heaven.
10. Olob o slar칡l tolal ku tus ors duhsherk Shesu-Kri gula tu chiss칙d ku Sent-Ospli dhual elesapot?
10. 툾ulub 툾u sl톛x팳il tul퉢툾al k퉝i tu툾x팳퉝dx퉝s팳톛q Shesu-Kri g퉝톛l tuc팳톛sad k퉝i Sent-Ospli dx퉝툾al 툾톛 lesapot.
10. ten Q days from the go+up Jesus+Christ then sent the Holy+Spirit unto the apostles
10. Was it ten days after His ascension to heaven that He sent the Holy Spirit to the apostles?
E, olob slar칡l tolal ku tus ors duhsherk Shesu-Kri gula tu chiss칙d ku Sent-Ospli dhual elesapot.
툾i, 툾ulub sl톛x팳il tul퉢툾al k퉝i tu툾ux팳퉝sdx퉝s팳톛q s팳hesu-kli g퉝톛l tuc팳톛sad k퉝i s톛nt-Ospli dx퉝툾al 툾톛 lesapot.
yes ten Q days from the go+up Jesus+Christ then sent the Holy+Spirit unto the apostles
Yes, it was ten days after His ascension to heaven that He sent the Holy Spirit to the apostles.
